case_title: GABRIELA ROSAL ET AL VS. DAVID NEWMAN

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT CREDITORS REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING (FERDINAND B. DRANE III) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRANE III, FERDINAND B
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DAVID NEWMAN ON AUG-04-2016 - DENIED. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS GABRIELA ROSAL & FERDINAND B. DRANE, III. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT & MOVING PARTY DAVID NEWMAN. DENISE NEWMAN, (DEFENDANT'S WIFE) WAS ALSO PRESENT AT TODAY'S HEARING AND REQUESTED TO APPEAR ON HER HUSBAND'S BEHALF. THE COURT DENIED MS. NEWMAN'S REQUEST. PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION TO VACATE ON FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROSAL, GABRIELA DRANE III, FERDINAND B AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT DAVID NEWMAN'S MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT ENTERED 5/26/15.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY (2) PLAINTIFFS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSAL, GABRIELA DRANE III, FERDINAND B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID
JUDGMENT CREDITORS REQUEST FOR FUNDS COPIED TO ACCOUNTING (GABRIELA ROSAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSAL, GABRIELA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $4,255.15 RE 34255 FOR TRANSACTION W0416812D001 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO G ROSAL AND F B DRANE III, DOC #1907858642, WARRANT #38204630, DATED OCT-06-2016
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $90.00 SERVED APR-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWMAN, DAVID
